claim_boundary.next_gate: Implement tools/b5_production_dmrg_mps_denominator.py with non-exact-state-seeded canonical sweeps, stored environments, convergence ledgers, and same-access cost accounting.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a production DMRG implementation, not a deployable tensor solver, not a same-access positive route, not quantum advantage, and not a BQP separation.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: A W1-specific acceptance gate that preserves the B5/B10 row contract and enumerates the production DMRG/MPS requirements still blocking a positive B5/B10 route.

requirements.label: W4 row contract is preserved for all W1 comparisons
requirements.required_next_step: Keep the same nine B5/B10 D5 observable rows and row_contract_hash in every W1 denominator run.

requirements.label: All nine rows expose environment-ledger diagnostics
requirements.required_next_step: Retain row-level environment telemetry while replacing post-hoc diagnostics with a real canonical sweep engine.

requirements.label: Non-exact-state-seeded production denominator is available
requirements.required_next_step: Implement a production DMRG/MPS denominator that does not initialize from the exact target state.

requirements.label: Stored canonical left/right environments and orthonormal residuals pass
requirements.required_next_step: Add canonical-center sweeps, stored left/right environments, and orthonormal residual checks for every row.

requirements.label: Sweep convergence ledgers satisfy fixed-sector, variance, discarded-weight, and monotonicity gates
requirements.required_next_step: Produce convergence ledgers that pass all four production diagnostics on the full nine-row contract.

requirements.label: Production W1 denominator beats seeded-pressure ladder under same access
requirements.required_next_step: Beat the exact-state-seeded pressure reference globally with a deployable non-seeded production denominator.

requirements.label: B10 same-access cost ledger is complete for DMRG/MPS comparison
requirements.required_next_step: Add wall-clock, matvec, sweep, memory, optimizer-loop, and denominator-ladder cost accounting.

requirements.label: B10-T1 positive route is ready without a hidden access advantage
requirements.required_next_step: Promote W1 to B10 only after the same-access production contract passes without oracle leakage.

requirements.label: W1 improves over the strongest current non-production tensor prototype
requirements.required_next_step: Use the current two-site/ALS evidence only as pressure input; do not accept it as production W1 evidence.

requirements.label: Forbidden claims remain false while W1 is unresolved
requirements.required_next_step: Continue blocking production-DMRG, same-access, quantum-advantage, and BQP claims until D1-D9 pass.

title: B5/B10 W1 Production DMRG/MPS Acceptance Gate
